lines.text: Hey Bob, James — quick sync before Christina joins. How's Q3 budget?
Tight. Alice, design may need to freeze hires unless we see runway through December.
I can delay the contractor if finance signs off. Bob, do you want numbers by Friday?
Send me the headcount breakdown, Alice. I'll model scenarios over the weekend.
Got it. I'll send the spreadsheet tonight after this call.
Sorry I'm late. James, is the API ready for the beta cohort?
Almost. Christina, I still need load tests before we flip the flag.
Loop me in on the test results. Alice, can design pause mockups until eng is green?
Only if Bob approves the hire freeze in writing.
Fair. I'll email approval tonight if Alice sends the headcount sheet.
I'll ping Christina when load tests pass. Bob, you'll get the infra cost estimate too.
